name: Magaldrate
description: Magaldrate is an antacid drug used for the treatment of esophagitis, duodenal and gastric ulcers, and gastroesophageal reflux. Magaldrate has been discontinued in the US market.

interactions.name: Misoprostol
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Magaldrate is combined with Misoprostol.

interactions.name: Bismuth Subcitrate
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Bismuth Subcitrate can be decreased when used in combination with Magaldrate.

interactions.name: Ketoconazole
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Ketoconazole can be decreased when it is combined with Magaldrate.

interactions.name: Methenamine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Methenamine can be decreased when used in combination with Magaldrate.

interactions.name: Doxycycline
interactions.description: Magaldrate can cause a decrease in the absorption of Doxycycline resulting in a reduced serum concentration and potentially a decrease in efficacy.
